summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Ayurved Life website. Backend APIs fully functional with all 10 products correctly displayed at ₹1,999. Frontend loads properly with all sections working. Minor mobile menu overlay issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu close button has overlay interception preventing automated clicks
ui_bugs.details: Menu opens correctly but overlay prevents close button interaction in automated tests. Manual testing may be needed.

passed_tests: Products endpoint returns all 10 products with ₹1,999 pricing
Homepage loads with hero section and fixed hero image
All 6 navigation links scroll to correct sections
All 10 product cards display with actual images and pricing
Product enquire buttons work and scroll to contact form
Consultation form accepts Name and Phone submissions
WhatsApp floating button visible and positioned correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (13/14 tests passed - 1 minor mobile menu issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile menu overlay interception issue to allow proper close button interaction. Consider adding force=True to click handlers or adjusting z-index/pointer-events CSS for mobile menu overlay.
